zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian V Count of Oldenburg於1340年出生在德國尼德薩辛歐登伯格時，他的父親Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg40歲，母親Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön26歲。他於1377年與Agnes von Honstein在德國福萊斯塔阿特 歐登伯格結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1399年4月6日之後。

zh-hans.Oldenburg in Holstein, Oldenburg, Schles: 德国海因里希_史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 歐登伯格歐登伯格 在 霍爾斯坦

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian V Count of Oldenburg于1340年出生在德国尼德薩辛歐登伯格时，他的父亲Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg40岁，母亲Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön26岁。他于1377年与Agnes von Honstein在德国福萊斯塔阿特 歐登伯格结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1399年4月6日之后。

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian V Count of Oldenburg was born in 1340, in Oldenburg, Lower Saxony, Germany, his father, Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg, was 40 and his mother, Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön, was 26. He married Agnes von Honstein in 1377, in Oldenburg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died after 6 April 1399.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian V Count of Oldenburg est né en 1340, à Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Agnes von Honstein en 1377, à Freistaat Oldenburg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé après 6 avril 1399.

de.Oldenburg in Holstein, Oldenburg, Schles: Oldenburg in Holstein, Kreis Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Christian V Count of Oldenburg 1340 in Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg 40 und seine Mutter Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön 26. Er hat 1377 in Freistaat Oldenburg, Deutschland Agnes von Honstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb nach 6. April 1399.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian V Count of Oldenburg è nato il nel 1340 nel Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Agnes von Honstein nel 1377, nel Freistaat Oldenburg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì dopo il 6 aprile 1399.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian V Count of Oldenburgが1340年にドイツニーダーサチセンオルデンブルグで生まれた時，父Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburgは40歳，母Ingeborg of Holstein-Plönは26歳であった。1377年にドイツフレイスタアト オルデンブルグでAgnes von Honsteinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1399年4月6日以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian V Count of Oldenburg(이)가 1340년 독일 니더작센 덴버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1377년 독일 프레이스타앳 덴버그에서 Agnes von Honstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1399년 4월 6일 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian V Count of Oldenburg nasceu em 1340, em Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes von Honstein em 1377, em Freistaat Oldenburg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu após 6 de abril de 1399.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian V Count of Oldenburg родился в 1340 г. в местности олденбург, ниедирсачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes von Honstein в 1377 г. в местности фристаат олденбург, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер после 6 апрель 1399 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian V Count of Oldenburg nació en 1340, en Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Alemania, su papá, Count of Oldenburg Conrad I of Oldenburg Count of Oldenburg, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Ingeborg of Holstein-Plön, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Agnes von Honstein en 1377, en Freistaat Oldenburg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió después de 6 de abril de 1399.
